MAP.COMMENT: Define HTTP headers record for API key authentication
Drop HTTP request variables no longer needed after API call
Set failure response when products API does not return HTTP 200

Values.value: Products API call failed with HTTP status %httpStatus% - %httpStatusMessage%

MAP.COMMENT: Drop JSON parsing variables and initialize restocking counters

LOOP.COMMENT: Set restocking flag for each product based on quantity thresholds

MAP.COMMENT: Copy current product fields and default restocking flag to GREEN
Mark product as RED when stock is below low threshold
Drop addInts variables after RED count increment
Mark product as ORANGE when stock is between thresholds
Drop addInts variables after ORANGE count increment
Drop addInts variables after GREEN count increment
Replace original products list with enriched products list
Set successful response and preserve declared output fields

Values.value: Calculated restocking flags for %httpStatus% response from products API

MAP.COMMENT: Set failure output from caught exception

Values.value: Error while retrieving products or calculating restocking flags: %lastError/error%
